offer: For medical clinics processing 5–15 compliance documents/month, regulatory changes cause missed deadlines. We automate document generation instead of manual document preparation and filing.
problem: Difficulty in generating and filing compliance documents accurately and on time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical compliance help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to medical clinics with demo video
Join community forums for sharing compliance tools
try_it: Let users try template library and editing interface on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
